sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29228" key="dusme/ristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσμέριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to chew up</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τραγήματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
